# PHImageRequestOptionsDeliveryMode

**Enumeration**

Options for delivering requested image data, used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptions/deliveryMode] property.

## Declaration

```swift
enum PHImageRequestOptionsDeliveryMode
```

## Constants

- **PHImageRequestOptionsDeliveryMode.opportunistic**: Photos automatically provides one or more results in order to balance image quality and responsiveness.
- **PHImageRequestOptionsDeliveryMode.highQualityFormat**: Photos provides only the highest-quality image available, regardless of how much time it takes to load.
- **PHImageRequestOptionsDeliveryMode.fastFormat**: Photos provides only a fast-loading image, possibly sacrificing image quality.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Specifying Image Request Options

- **version**: The version of the image to be requested.
- **PHImageRequestOptionsVersion**: Options for requesting an image asset with or without adjustments, used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptions/version] property.
- **deliveryMode**: The requested image quality and delivery priority.
- **resizeMode**: A mode that specifies how to resize the requested image.
- **PHImageRequestOptionsResizeMode**: Options for how to resize the requested image to fit a target size, used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptions/resizeMode] property.
- **normalizedCropRect**: A rectangle for requesting a cropped version of the original image.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
